title: Baker Ross EV3104 Farm Animal Foam Stickers (Pack Of 96) For Kids Arts and Crafts
features: Stickers for Kids: This multipack of 3D self-adhesive foam stickers contains a range of cute farm animals in a range of different designs. Kids will enjoy choosing from the range of different farmyard animals including cows. chickens, pigs and more

Kids Arts and Crafts Supply: Boys and girls will enjoy adding these adorable stickers to arts and crafts. This value pack of stickers is perfect for embellishing crafts at school, in the classroom and at home
Versatile Craft Stickers: These mess free sticker embellishments can be simply peeled and then stuck to Baker Ross card blanks, card shapes and many other paper and card crafts (not included)
Included in the Pack: This pack contains 96 stickers in designs include horse, donkey, dog, chicken, pig, goat, mouse, turkey, duck, sheep, rabbit and cow. Sticker size 30mm-65mm. For ages 3+

Made by experts: Baker Ross has been designing and providing art and craft supplies, and toys to schools, groups and parents for over 40 years. All products conform to General Product Safety Regulations, and state age recommendation where applicable.
description: Product Description Foam stickers for kids can stick to paper, card, plastic or whatever else you are decorating. These cool stickers can be used to decorate or embellish the wide range of own brand craft activities and kits available on our shop. Add shining effects to all crafts and decorations with out tiny stickers Glitter star shaped stickers made from sparkling glitter foam. Comes in Baker Rossis a family owned and run business creating innovative arts, craft projects for kids and party favor products. Designed in the United Kingdom - Baker Ross: inspiring creativity. Safety Warning WARNING! Not suitable for children under 36 months - small parts. Choking hazard. Retain address.
